analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral greeting celebrating International Peace Day, noting that both Russia and Cambodia know the value of peace and expressing hope for future generations. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not mentioned or implied. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – no reference to multipolarity, non-Western structures, or alternative order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – the tweet associates Russia with peace and goodwill (congratulations on Peace Day, shared value of peace with Cambodia, hope for youth). This subtly frames Russia as supportive of peace and a friendly partner, fitting RU3. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – no historical achievements cited. RU5 (Russia at forefront) – no current successes highlighted. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature) – not applicable. Conclusion: Promotes RU3.
